archetype: 3 (Pastel & Soft) mixed with 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - iOS Clean Clarity
design_philosophy: Optical Clarity & Tactile iOS. The UI must feel like a premium, native iOS App Store application (e.g. Health app, Settings). Absolute clean light mode, zero gradients, generous spacing, and crystal-clear glassmorphism.

typography.font_family_headings: System (SF Pro Display), fallback: Outfit, Plus Jakarta Sans
typography.font_family_body: System (SF Pro Text), fallback: Inter, system-ui

glassmorphism.rules: Use BlurView with tint='light' and intensity={80}. Must include a 1px inner stroke of border_glass (rgba(255,255,255,0.4)) for optical clarity. Apply to Floating Tab Bar and Sticky Headers.

images.description: Clean laptop desk setup for UI/UX course
Business analytics charts for Data course
Social media icons/signage for Marketing course
Thai student portrait for user profile

animations.interactions: All pressable elements (buttons, cards) MUST have a scale down effect (e.g., scale: 0.97) on press-in using React Native Animated or Reanimated. Opacity change on press is insufficient for premium iOS feel.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the Clean Light Mode. Do NOT implement a Dark Mode. The app must feel light, airy, and premium.
Do NOT use gradients anywhere. Backgrounds, buttons, and overlays must use solid colors or blur effects.
Utilize expo-blur's BlurView for authentic iOS glassmorphism. Specifically apply it to the floating tab navigation bar and screen headers.
Retain Mydemy Pink (#ef5ea8) as the primary action and accent color. Use #F2F2F7 for the main app background to allow pure white (#FFFFFF) cards to pop.
Implement iOS-style cards: white background, very subtle shadow (opacity 0.04), and large rounded corners (24px).
Use standard React Native styles/StyleSheet or NativeWind if configured. Ensure generous padding (e.g. 24px container margins).
Ensure all interactive elements have rich press states (scale down animations) and include `data-testid` attributes.
